docs.title: MH
docs.text:
An MH-based annealer to miniaturize a graph.

Attributes:

Name Type Description schedule callable

The annealing schedule of the MH algorithm.

weigths dict of str to float

Dictionary of associated with each target metric.

graph_ Graph

The generated graph miniature.

docs.title: metrics: list[str] property
docs.text: Names of metrics to target

docs.title: trajectories_: pd.DataFrame property
docs.text: DataFrame containing the trajectories of associated with the miniaturization procedure

docs.title: weights: list[str] property
docs.text: Names of metrics associated with weights

docs.title: __init__(metrics, schedule=None, weights=None, n_changes=1, func_loss=None)
docs.text:
Parameters:

Name Type Description Default metrics dict of str to callable

Dictionary containing the functions used to evaluate the graph metrics.

required schedule callable

A function that returns the value of the inverse temperature at every iteration.

None weights dict of str to float

Dictionary containing the relative weights of every graph metric.

None n_changes int

Number of changes implemented at each iteration.

1 func_loss callable

A callable that will take a list of weights and a list of differences in graph metrics and evaluate the loss.

None

docs.title: transform(graph_seed, targets, n_iterations=None, epsilon=None, beta=None, verbose=False)
docs.text:
Miniaturizes seed graph

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default graph_seed Graph

The initial graph to optimize.

required targets dict[str, float]

Dictionary containing the graph metrics to target.

required n_iterations int

Number of iterations the annealer will be run for.

None epsilon float

Tolerance value to determine metrics convergence.

None beta float

Initial inverse-temperature to be used in the automatic scheduling.

None verbose bool

Flat indicating whether or not to print progress.

False

docs.title: CoarseNET
docs.text:
A class that implements the CoarseNET algorithm for an unweighted, undirected graph.

Attributes:

Name Type Description G_coarse Graph

Coarsened graph.

alpha float

Shrinkage factor

docs.text:
Original Graph

Returns:

Name Type Description G Graph

The original graph to miniaturize

Name Type Description Default alpha float

Shrinkage factor.

Graph to coarsen.

required

docs.text:

Name Type Description Default G Graph

A graph to construct the adjacency matrix.

required

docs.title: coarsen()
docs.text: Coarsens the seed graph

docs.title: eigs(G) staticmethod
docs.text:
Computes the dominant eigenvalue and eigenvectors associated with the adjacency matrix of a graph.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default G Graph

Graph to calculate eigenvalue and eigenvectors.

required
